data.title: Institutional Adoption Wave Rocks Ripple’s XRP After Chinese Firm Targets $300 Million XRP Treasury
data.description:
Chinese travel and mobility conglomerate Webus International filed a Form 6-K with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on June 2 to formally disclose its plans to establish a $300 million XRP treasury. The move marks one of the largest crypto treasury bids by a public Chinese company to date and signals rising institutional […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/institutional-adoption-wave-rocks-ripples-xrp-after-chinese-firm-targets-300-million-xrp-treasury/

data.title: Trump said he doesn't mind Musk's opposition to him, emphasizing that if the bill is not passed, there will be a 68% tax increase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump posted on his social platform today that he did not care about Musk's opposition, but his position should have been made clear a few months ago. He called the bill currently submitted to Congress "one of the greatest bills in history," including a record $1.6 trillion in spending cuts and the largest tax cuts in history. Trump warned that if the bill fails to pass, taxes will rise by 68%, "there are worse things than this." He emphasized that he did not create chaos, but was committed to fixing problems and making the country great, and called for "making America great again."

data.title: BREAKING: Uber Explores Global Stablecoin Transfers as CEO Hails Bitcoin ‘Proven’ Store of Value
data.description:
Uber is exploring using stablecoins, seeing them as a faster, cheaper route for crossborder payouts. CEO Dara Khosrowshahi noted Bitcoin’s store-of-value role and left the door open to accepting crypto for rides when high fees and emissions concerns drop, as US lawmakers debate stablecoin rules.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uber-stablecoin-transfers-bitcoin-value/

data.title: Elon Musk alleges Trump is in 'Epstein files', and folks are losing it
data.description:
Elon Musk publicly accused Donald Trump of being named in the Epstein files, fueling online backlash and confusion. Crypto Twitter lit up as users reacted to the explosive claim, which remains unverified.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/elon-musk-alleges-trump-is-in-epstein-files-and-folks-are-losing-it

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market news shows that Tesla (TSLA) stock price fell sharply today, with the intraday decline widening to 17%, and its market value shrinking by about US$100 billion.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: We may see a "crypto IPO frenzy"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes posted on social media today that the market has completed a "cycle" and the spirit of ICO in 2017 has now transformed into the crypto IPO boom of 2025-2027. "This is the beginning of a frenzy that will end with an IPO like EOS that attracts huge amounts of fiat currency and plummets at the opening."

data.title: JPMorgan Plunges Deeper Into Crypto By Letting Clients Use Bitcoin ETFs As Loan Collateral
data.description:
JPMorgan, America’s biggest bank by total assets, is set to let its trading and wealth-management clients use certain crypto-linked assets.
source: https://zycrypto.com/jpmorgan-plunges-deeper-into-crypto-by-letting-clients-use-bitcoin-etfs-as-loan-collateral/
